summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IBS Auto Center workshop management system. All backend APIs working correctly (23/23 passed). Frontend features implemented and functional including search bars, labor cost field, and client/vehicle display in quotes.

resolved_bugs.issue: Missing reportlab dependency for PDF generation

passed_tests: Client CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Vehicle CRUD operations with client association
Part CRUD operations with stock management
Quote creation with labor cost field
Vehicles page title display (VEÍCULOS without escaped characters)
Quote dialog with labor cost (Mão de Obra) field
Quote cards displaying client name and vehicle information
